title: MSC
description: Minecraft Server Commands. Commands Made for a Minecraft Server.
body:
Minecraft Server Commands

/About-MSC command:
About Minecraft Server Commands (MSC)
- KillMe (Non Operator) Kills self ("/kill @s" basically).
- tpa (Non Operator) Sends a request to teleport to the player provided.
- tpa-accept (Non Operator) Accepts the tpa request to teleport to the player that requested.
- gm (Operator Level 2) Basically "/gamemode" but a shorter version c=creative, sv=survival, sp=spectator, a=adventure.
- i (Operator Level 2) Gives a player or players a full stack of the items provided.
- mass_summon (Operator Level 2) Summons multiple of an entity at a certain position.


<details>
<summary>In a Modpack</summary>

I am **fine** with this **being used in a modpack** as long as credited.

</details>
